data.title: Global Crypto Pivot: Elliptic's report highlights banks adopting stablecoins in the U.S., Asia & Middle East.
data.description: Elliptic recently reported a global trend towards innovation, with a particular focus on developments in the United States. The report also highlighted the growing popularity of stablecoins and the increasing regulatory momentum in the Asia-Pacific and Middle East regions. This shift is indicative of a broader movement towards innovation and adaptation within the financial sector.

data.title: CenterPoint Energy declares $0.23 dividend per share on Common Stock, payable on March 12 to shareholders of record on Feb 19.
data.description: In Houston, CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) has announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.2300 per share on Common Stock. The dividend is payable on March 12, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 19, 2026. CenterPoint Energy, Inc. serves around 7 million metered customers across Indiana and is a multi-state electric and natural gas delivery company.

data.title: Ascot Resources Ltd sets Dec 16, 2025 as effective date for 50:1 share consolidation amid larger restructuring process.
data.description: Ascot Resources Ltd. is based in Vancouver, British Columbia, and has announced that their share consolidation, scheduled for December 16, 2025, will involve converting 50 pre-consolidation common shares into one post-consolidation common share. This move was disclosed in a press release on October 23, 2025. The company, with trading symbols TSXV: AOT.H and OTCID: AOTVF, is undergoing a broader restructuring initiative which includes a rights offering, the share consolidation, a bridge financing, and a private placement.

data.title: Long-term Bitcoin buyers increase as market faces liquidity challenges, with experts hopeful amid whale accumulation.
data.description: With major obstacles being cleared in the macro environment, experts are feeling cautiously optimistic about the current situation. Bitcoin whales have been accumulating more of the cryptocurrency, signaling confidence in the market. Additionally, liquidity has been decreasing as the holidays approach, which could potentially lead to increased volatility. The overall sentiment is positive despite some uncertainties in the market.

data.title: Terra founder Do Kwon gets 15-year prison sentence for $40B crypto fraud, described as 'epic' & 'generational.'
data.description: Do Kwon, a cryptocurrency fraudster, has received a 15-year prison sentence for his involvement in the collapse of the Terra (CRYPTO: LUNA) cryptocurrency, leading to a significant market crash. U.S. District Judge Paul A. Engelmayer, who issued the sentence, criticized Kwon for his continuous deception of investors who had entrusted their life savings to him. The judge labeled the fraud as "epic" and "generational," emphasizing the severe damage caused. This case is considered one of the most harmful frauds in the history of federal prosecution. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: China sets economic tone for 2026 at Central Economic Work Conference, focusing on strengthening domestic demand.
data.description: In a report published during the annual Central Economic Work Conference in Beijing, CGTN highlighted China's focus for 2026 on enhancing domestic demand and progressing towards economic goals. The conference saw Chinese leaders convene to strategize on key economic issues. The agenda reveals China's determination to bolster its domestic market, emphasizing self-sufficiency. This move signals a shift towards prioritizing internal consumption over reliance on foreign markets. The emphasis on domestic demand aligns with China's broader economic strategy, supporting sustainable growth.
